expectations.text: Response includes a preflight report section

expectations.text: Preflight call graph section flags a latency or timing risk from adding System_printf or notes it would violate the 2μs budget
expectations.evidence: Call graph check: RISK — vtable dispatch through System_Module_State, interrupt-disable window from Gate_enterSystem, best-case path costs ~75–135 cycles vs 96-cycle budget. 'Budget violation near-certain.'

expectations.text: Preflight Execution fit is ADJUST PLAN or STOP, not GOOD
expectations.evidence: Execution fit: ADJUST PLAN. Recommends lock-free ring buffer instead of System_printf on the hot path.

expectations.text: Response does NOT include a '## Preflight:' section

expectations.text: Response includes a preflight report section
expectations.evidence: Preflight ran for ValidateBLEConnectionHandle. Call graph RISK, arithmetic RISK (signed type promotion on handle parameter), resources OK. ADJUST PLAN.

expectations.text: Preflight includes an arithmetic check
expectations.evidence: Arithmetic RISK flagged: callers passing handle as signed type could produce large unsigned value through silent sign-promotion. Mandates explicit uint16_t parameter type.

expectations.text: Response includes a preflight report section
expectations.evidence: Preflight ran for osal_mem_free fix. Arithmetic RISK (unsigned subtraction underflow wraps to huge value), resources RISK (HAL_EXIT_CRITICAL_SECTION must be paired with every return path). ADJUST PLAN.

expectations.text: Preflight includes an arithmetic check flagging the unsigned wraparound risk
expectations.evidence: Arithmetic RISK: 'block->size - OSAL_MEM_HDR_SIZE uses unsigned types with no underflow guard. A corrupted block header where size < OSAL_MEM_HDR_SIZE wraps to a huge positive value, causing the allocator to corrupt the free list.'

expectations.text: Response includes a preflight report section
expectations.evidence: Preflight ran for OAD_open refactor. Call graph RISK, arithmetic OK, resources RISK (double-free risk on oadCCCDTable, mq_close sentinel required, incomplete fix if other paths also leak). ADJUST PLAN.

expectations.text: Preflight Resources check flags freed-resource or resource-lifetime concern — whether every exit path releases oadCCCDTable and hOadQ, or whether the cleanup introduces a double-free risk
expectations.evidence: Resources RISK: '(1) Double-free risk on oadCCCDTable: any prior early-return path in OAD_open that already frees it would make the new cleanup a double-free. (2) hOadQ must be initialized to (mqd_t)-1 and guarded before mq_close. (3) Fix is incomplete if other error paths also leak.'

expectations.text: Response includes a preflight report section
expectations.evidence: Preflight ran for OAD_open + GAPBondMgr_FindAddr. Two call graph RISK findings. Arithmetic OK. Resources OK. ADJUST PLAN.

expectations.text: Preflight call graph section flags a call-order or initialization hazard — GAPBondMgr_FindAddr has a dependency on the bond manager being initialized before OAD_open is invoked
expectations.evidence: Call graph RISK: 'GAPBondMgr_FindAddr depends on the Bond Manager being initialized via GAPBondMgr_Register. If OAD_open is reachable before that initialization completes, the function will produce false negatives (bonded devices appear unbonded).'
